item.title: Bro smile returns when he reminds us to love.
item.description: He's doing better. Reminds us not to waste food for entertainment when there's people who need it.
item.dc:creator: Trojan1109

item.description: She's seeing a therapist twice a month. My dad's side of the family and my sister are very religious. My dad keeps pushing me to just talk to my sister but I'm refusing to. After the police investigation and children services investigation it came down to a he said/she said situation and he called my daughter a liar. I think he's disgusting and abusive to his own kids so I'm keeping my distance. Edit: to clarify, her father and I got the police involved and a victim advocate. The detective brought charges to the prosecutor but they declined to prosecute because there wasn't enough evidence. Our justice system is whack
item.dc:creator: Mycatisbetterthanyourcat03

item.title: P Dumple
item.description:
I quit drinking
As a result of someone’s
Imgur Post where someone did
A before and after drinking
Picture and story
I don’t know why that post
Among many affected me
And unfortunately I did not
Save the post to say thank you
But I will say keep posting
Those because you
Never know who is listening
And though you may not
Get a response
People are still paying
Attention.
The
End
Wonder if it’s his scrotum skin
I like the color blue and
Long walks on bleach
I don’t like the new design of Klingons
Diapers suck
Wonder if any Wookiee used gel?
Mr Ed is less than a memory now
Piggly Wiggly is a cool name
I will never have abs I hate cooking
Only way to travel
This scene was weird as a child
Cats are better than dogs
Dogs are better than cats
Len is better than Ryu
Dove commercials confused me as a kid
Sure he was cross when he was done
Punny
Beep
Boop
Beep
This baby terrifies me
He says bye!
item.dc:creator: bizaker02

item.title: 7 years clean & sober
item.description: It's been 7 years... Every cell in my body has been replaced. I am no longer the person I once was... Life is good.

item.title: Black dress
item.description:
These heels look stunning but I miss my boots :'D
Cat tax: Mr. Chonk having some good ol' lap time, I melt when I see him tuck in his little feets! If you would like to see more of my illustrations you can find them on my Instagram (I don't post them here as much as I do there): https://www.instagram.com/revives_illustrations Or if you want to support me: https://www.patreon.com/AmyRevives
